title: 8 Herbal Creams for Cirrhosis Patients to Reduce Enlarged Spleen
description: Rauvolfia serpentina creams are used to help with enlarged spleen, a condition where the spleen becomes too big and can cause problems. The creams contain properties and constituents like reserpine, which helps to reduce the size of the spleen by relaxing the blood vessels and reducing inflammation.
